samples.code:
import json
from pathlib import Path

def load_config(config_path: str = "config.json") -> dict:
    path = Path(config_path)
    data = json.loads(path.read_text())
    if "version" not in data:
        raise ValueError("Missing version field")
    return data
samples.label: clean
samples.description: 正确的配置加载+验证

samples.label: clean
samples.description: 正确的 Generic 类实现

samples.code:
import asyncio
from asyncio import Queue

async def producer(q: Queue[int]) -> None:
    for i in range(5):
        await q.put(i)
    await q.put(None)

async def consumer(q: Queue[int]) -> None:
    results = []
    while True:
        item = await q.get()
        if item is None:
            break
        results.append(item)
    assert results == [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]
samples.label: clean
samples.description: 正确的 asyncio.Queue 生产者-消费者

samples.label: clean
samples.description: 正确的 @overload 装饰器

samples.code:
import aiosqlite

async def query(db_path: str):
    async with aiosqlite.connect(db_path) as db:
        cursor = await db.execute("SELECT 1")
        row = await cursor.fetchone()
        return row
samples.label: clean
samples.description: 正确的 aiosqlite 异步查询

samples.code:
from typing import Final

MAX_RETRIES: Final = 3
TIMEOUT_SECONDS: Final[float] = 30.0

def should_retry(attempt: int) -> bool:
    return attempt < MAX_RETRIES
